name: HackerRank Technical Assessment API
what_it_does: HackerRank REST API for technical skills assessment and developer hiring platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage coding tests, invite candidates, retrieve assessment scores and code submissions, track hiring funnel progress, and integrate technical screening into ATS workflows. HackerRank is widely used for technical hiring screening across the software industry.
use_cases: Creating and sending coding assessments from technical recruiting automation agents
Retrieving candidate scores and code submissions from hiring workflow agents
Integrating technical screening results with ATS from recruiting integration agents
Managing talent pool and assessment libraries from technical recruiting agents
not_for: Non-technical hiring without coding assessment requirements
Academic proctored exams without hiring context
Consumer coding education without hiring workflow integration
best_when: A tech company or recruiting team wants AI agents to automate technical screening by sending HackerRank assessments, tracking completions, and importing scores into ATS workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Candidate code submissions and assessment scores are sensitive hiring data. Assessment results used in hiring decisions require EEOC compliance and bias monitoring.

auth.notes: HackerRank uses API key in Basic auth header (key as username, empty password). Keys are account-scoped per company. Simple authentication model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: limited tests and candidates; Developer tier for basic screening
pricing.paid_tiers: Team, Professional, and Enterprise plans scaling tests, candidates, and anti-cheat features
pricing.notes: Widely used developer assessment platform. Competitive developer-friendly pricing. API access available on Team plan and above.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Candidate code and assessment scores are sensitive hiring data — EEOC compliance required
No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth (API key as username)
Assessment invitations expire — implement resend logic for stale invites
No granular API scopes — key provides full account access
Webhook events for test completion are more reliable than polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Candidate assessment and hiring data. SOC2. US-only. Basic auth API key. No granular scopes. EEOC compliance for assessment-based hiring.

security_score_components.security_notes: Candidate hiring assessment data. SOC2. US-only. Basic auth key. No granular scopes. EEOC compliance required.
